REDDWARF-NOVA_FIVE.description: At the start of each combat, gain 2 [aqua]Scrap[/aqua].
REDDWARF-NOVA_FIVE.flavor: Part of the Nova fleet, a Space Corps starship once powered by a Duality Jump Drive and operating in Deep Space.
REDDWARF-NOVA_FIVE.title: Nova 5
REDDWARF-SS_TROJAN.description: Replaces [gold]Pure Water[/gold]. At the start of each turn, gain 1 [aqua]Scrap[/aqua].
REDDWARF-SS_TROJAN.flavor: S.S. Trojan was a derelict Quantum Twister class starship used by the Space Corps Infinity Fleet.
REDDWARF-SS_TROJAN.title: S.S. Trojan
